Index

Modules: vancode, vancode/interpreter/ast, vancode/interpreter/chunk, vancode/interpreter/codegen, vancode/interpreter/errors, vancode/interpreter/resolver, vancode/interpreter/stdlib/syslib, vancode/interpreter/stdlib/utils, vancode/interpreter/sym, vancode/interpreter/value, vancode/interpreter/vm, vancode/manager/configurator, vancode/manager/packager, vancode/manager/remote.

API symbols

`$`:
  • ast: proc `$`(node: Node): string
  • chunk: proc `$`(c: Chunk): string
  • chunk: proc `$`(s: Script): string
  • sym: proc `$`(module: Module): string
  • sym: proc `$`(scope: Scope): string
  • sym: proc `$`(params: seq[ProcParam]): string
  • sym: proc `$`(sym: Sym): string
  • value: proc `$`(value: Value): string
  • configurator: proc `$`(c: PackageConfig): string
`==`:
  • chunk: proc `==`(a, b: Chunk): bool
  • sym: proc `==`(a, b: Context): bool
`[]=`:
  • ast: proc `[]=`(node: Node; index: int | BackwardsIndex; child: Node)

  • ast: proc `[]`(node: Node; index: int | BackwardsIndex): Node
  • ast: proc `[]`(node: Node; slice: HSlice): seq[Node]
